sections.title: Insurance and COI Verification Checklist Insp Ack
sections.html:
ACKNOWLEDGMENT

This policy outlines the requirements for verifying insurance and Certificates of Insurance (COI) for all subcontractors and vendors working with MH Construction. Ensuring proper coverage is critical for mitigating financial risks and complying with contractual obligations. All COIs must meet the minimum coverage limits specified in MH Construction's master service agreements and be on file prior to commencement of work. Regular verification ensures continuous compliance and protection against unforeseen liabilities.

I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction Insurance and COI Verification Policy as required by OSHA: 29 CFR 1926.16 and WISHA: WAC 296-155-110.

Employee Signatures:

sections.title: Insurance and COI Verification Checklist Insp Ack (continued 2)
